category_sources: source_facts.description says Sollya is for safe floating-point code development; official Sollya manual documents a numerical computation tool.

docs_sources: Official Sollya website publishes the current 8.0 command help and user manual under sollya.org.
repo_sources: Official Sollya website links to the Inria GitLab project for Sollya source code.
